meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't validate ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't validate ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Validate SaaS Ideas Faster (Expert Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop guessing and start shipping. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to validate SaaS ideas in record time with this advanced checklist.
content.answer_block: To overcome the paralysis of idea validation, leverage the Antigravity project template to scaffold production-ready architecture instantly. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate and focus purely on core business logic, allowing you to deploy a functional MVP in hours rather than weeks of manual setup.
content.intro:
The graveyard of abandoned SaaS projects is filled with brilliant ideas that died in the 'validation phase.' You spend weeks configuring databases, auth flows, and UI frameworks, only to realize your target market doesn't exist. It is a slow, agonizing death for any freelancer's profit margin.

But the game has changed. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you bypass the friction of initial setup. We aren't just writing code; we are weaponizing your workflow. This is how you transform from a developer who 'thinks' into a builder who 'ships'—validating demand with actual, deployed software before the competition even finishes their README.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base architecture immediately to ensure your project inherits best-in-class security and scalability patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Define Domain Models via Claude Code
steps.description: Translate your business logic into database schemas without manual migration headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma models for a multi-tenant SaaS application including User, Workspace, and Subscription tables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate prisma schema for multi-tenant SaaS. Focus on RLS policies and user roles.'

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Logic
steps.description: Rapidly build out your API layer by instructing Claude to follow the established project patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure API route for handling user onboarding flows based on the Antigravity project structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Create a Next.js API route that handles user onboarding, including Supabase auth checks and database insertion.'

steps.title: Inject UI Component Library
steps.description: Use pre-built design patterns to ensure your MVP looks like a premium product from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a responsive dashboard layout using the project's existing Tailwind and Radix UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Create a dashboard layout component using our existing design system. Include a sidebar, header, and main content area.'

steps.title: Execute E2E Validation Tests
steps.description: Ensure your MVP is functional by automating user flow testing before deploying to a public URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright tests for the primary conversion path, from landing page to checkout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Write Playwright E2E tests for the user registration and subscription checkout flow.'

pro_tips: Always run 'claude --refresh' after modifying the Antigravity schema to sync the context window with your local database state.
Use custom system prompts in Claude Code to enforce your specific code style, reducing the need for manual linting fixes.
Leverage the Antigravity 'mock-data' script to seed your local environment immediately, allowing for real-world UI testing before backend completion.
Connect your terminal to a cloud-based IDE to allow Claude Code to trigger deployments directly from your CLI once validation tests pass.
Strip out unused boilerplate modules from the Antigravity template early to reduce bundle size and improve initial load performance.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up analytics and a feedback loop. Your goal is to get 10 real users to hit your checkout page within 48 hours to validate your pricing model.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping with precision. The bridge between a 'good idea' and a 'profitable product' is execution speed. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
